commands.review_summary:
Adds known hallucinated Office-document extension correction for read paths and rejection for write/edit/memory-flush paths in agent file-tool parameter normalization.

PR surface: Source +127. Total +127 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows the workspace guard corrects the path before wrapped write/edit validation can reject it in workspace-only compositions. I did not run the tool stack because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch requires author-visible code repair plus updated contributor proof; automation should not take over while real behavior proof is stale and required.

target.title: fix(agents): correct model-hallucinated document extensions in file tool path params
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

When models blend "codex" into office-document extensions (e.g. GPT-5.4 via Codex runtime), they produce hallucinated paths like `report.docodex` instead of `report.docx`. The existing agent-tool path normalization pipeline only strips malformed XML `</arg_value>>` suffixes — it has no awareness of hallucinated file extensions, so these pass through unchanged and cause file-not-found errors.

Fixes #93326

## Summary

Add `correctHallucinatedFileExtension` to the shared agent-tool path normalization pipeline. Known hallucinated extensions (`.docodex`, `.pptcodex`, `.xlscodex`, etc.) are silently corrected to their real counterparts (`.docx`, `.pptx`, `.xlsx`) before filesystem execution.

The correction reuses the existing `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys` pipeline — no new guard layer, no rejection/retry logic, no behavioral change beyond the extension substitution. Both corrections (XML suffix stripping + hallucinated extension correction) run in sequence within the same normalization pass.

**What changed:**
- `src/agents/agent-tools.params.ts` — added `HALLUCINATED_EXTENSION_MAP` constant and `correctHallucinatedFileExtension` function; integrated into `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys`
- `src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts` — added `correctHallucinatedFileExtension` to the direct `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffix` call in `wrapToolWorkspaceRootGuardWithOptions`

**What did NOT change (scope boundary):**
- No change to agent-tools.read.ts call sites that already use `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys` (the correction is integrated there)
- No change to bash-tools.exec.ts (already uses `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys`)
- No new guard layer, no rejection/retry, no new files

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Model-supplied paths like `report.docodex` pass through the current path-normalization pipeline unchanged, causing file-operation failures.

**Environment tested**:
- Runtime: Node 24.13.1, Linux
- Code analysis path: `src/agents/agent-tools.params.ts` → `correctHallucinatedFileExtension` / `stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys`

**Steps run after the patch**:
```bash
node --import tsx --no-warnings proof-93326-before-after.mjs
```

**Evidence after fix**:

BEFORE (main branch — bug confirmed):
```
=== BEFORE: main branch behavior ===
  ❌ BUG CONFIRMED: .docodex passes through → {"path":"report.docodex"}
  ❌ BUG CONFIRMED: .pptcodex passes through → {"path":"slides.pptcodex"}
  ❌ BUG CONFIRMED: .xlscodex passes through → {"path":"budget.xlscodex"}
```

AFTER (fix branch — all corrected):
```
=== correctHallucinatedFileExtension (standalone) ===
Hallucinated extensions that SHOULD be corrected:
  PASS: report.docodex → report.docx
  PASS: path/to/report.docodex → path/to/report.docx
  PASS: /abs/path/report.docodex → /abs/path/report.docx
  PASS: slides.pptcodex → slides.pptx
  PASS: budget.xlscodex → budget.xlsx
  PASS: report.docxcodex → report.docx

Real extensions that must NOT be modified:
  PASS: report.docx → report.docx
  PASS: slides.pptx → slides.pptx
  PASS: budget.xlsx → budget.xlsx
  PASS: notes.txt → notes.txt

=== stripMalformedXmlArgValueSuffixFromKeys (pipeline integration) ===
  PASS: docodex corrected → {"path":"report.docx"}
  PASS: real docx unchanged → {"path":"report.docx"}
  PASS: XML suffix + docodex both corrected → {"path":"report.docx"}
  PASS: pptcodex corrected → {"path":"slides.pptx"}
  PASS: xlscodex corrected → {"path":"budget.xlsx"}
  PASS: only path corrected, content unchanged → {"path":"report.docx","content":"hello"}

✅ ALL PROOFS PASSED
```

**Observed result after the fix**: Hallucinated extensions are silently corrected in the same normalization pipeline that already strips XML suffixes. Real extensions pass through unchanged.

**What was not tested**: Live Gateway/agent session with GPT-5.4 producing hallucinated extensions (no Codex runtime environment available). The correction was verified against the production path-normalization functions directly.
target.author: zoowh
